{{Quote|This warrant says your head is worth 12000 credits. Shut up or I'll take it in without the rest of you.|Lliandri|<ref name="Seregar Turnabout">{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}}</ref>}}
'''Lliandri''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Color/Legends|green-skinned]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Lliandri was sold into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] at an early age, but she escaped her owner and managed to eke out a living on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. Later, she accidentally [[Death/Legends|killed]] a criminal on Ord Mantell in self-defense, and despite her sadness at the death, she relished the reward she got from the local authorities. It was then that she chose to become a bounty hunter.

Lliandri was tall with dark eyes. She favored using dual [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistols]] and kept her [[Lekku/Legends|head-tails]] constantly in motion in order to distract her prey.

As a hunter, Lliandri refused to take [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] contracts because the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] allowed slavery. She was also an associate of the bounty hunter [[Tern Ashandrik]].

==Appearances==
